data.name: Controller name
data.sensor_resets_timer: Reset timer when sensor turns off

data_description.name: A unique name for this controller instance.
data_description.delay: How many seconds targets stay active before turning off.
data_description.sensors: Motion sensors or binary sensors that trigger this controller.
data_description.sensor_devices: Pick devices whose entities will be added as sensors.
data_description.entities: Lights, switches, or other entities this controller turns on/off.
data_description.control_devices: Pick devices whose entities will be added as control targets.
data_description.trigger_on_activate: Extra entities to turn on when the controller activates.
data_description.trigger_on_deactivate: Extra entities to turn off when the controller deactivates.
data_description.state_entities: Entities used to determine current on/off state. Defaults to control entities if empty.
data_description.start_time: Daily start time for the active window. Leave empty for always-on.
data_description.end_time: Daily end time for the active window. Leave empty for always-on.
data_description.sensor_type: 'event' reacts to on/off transitions; 'duration' stays active while sensor is on.
data_description.sensor_resets_timer: When enabled, the timer resets each time the sensor turns off.
data_description.disable_block: Skip blocked state when a manual state change conflicts.
data_description.block_timeout: Seconds to remain in blocked state before retrying.

advanced.title: Entity Controller — Advanced
advanced.description: Step 2 of 2: advanced and optional settings. JSON fields must contain valid JSON objects.

data_description.service_data: JSON payload passed to turn-on service calls (e.g. brightness, color).
data_description.service_data_off: JSON payload passed to turn-off service calls.
data_description.night_mode: JSON object with alternate night-time settings (delay, service_data, etc.).
data_description.behaviours: JSON overrides for state-transition actions (on_enter_idle, on_enter_active, etc.).
data_description.state_attributes_ignore: Comma-separated attributes to ignore when comparing state changes.
data_description.ignored_event_sources: Comma-separated entity IDs whose events should be ignored.
data_description.friendly_name: Custom display name shown in the HA UI.
data_description.override: Single entity that forces override mode when active.
data_description.control_states_on: Comma-separated state values treated as ON for control entities.
data_description.control_states_off: Comma-separated state values treated as OFF for control entities.
data_description.sensor_states_on: Comma-separated state values treated as ON for sensors.
data_description.sensor_states_off: Comma-separated state values treated as OFF for sensors.
data_description.override_states_on: Comma-separated state values treated as ON for override entities.
data_description.override_states_off: Comma-separated state values treated as OFF for override entities.
data_description.state_states_on: Comma-separated state values treated as ON for state entities.
data_description.state_states_off: Comma-separated state values treated as OFF for state entities.
data_description.state_strings_on: Extra comma-separated strings that count as ON.
data_description.state_strings_off: Extra comma-separated strings that count as OFF.
data_description.backoff: Increase delay exponentially after each activation cycle.
data_description.backoff_factor: Multiplier applied to the delay after each cycle.
data_description.backoff_max: Maximum delay value when using backoff.
data_description.stay_mode: Keep targets active until manually turned off.
data_description.image_prefix: Filename prefix for generated diagram images.
data_description.image_path: Directory path for generated diagram images.
data_description.day_length: Debug: compressed day duration in seconds for testing.

error.missing_sensor: At least one sensor entity is required.
error.missing_control: At least one control entity (or trigger-on-activate entity) is required.
error.invalid_format: One or more values are invalid. Check number fields and JSON fields.

abort.already_configured: A controller with this name is already configured.
